title: Graph Lab filters and path finding
purpose: Improve graph exploration by allowing analysts to filter relation types and find bounded evidence paths.
actions: Add Graph Lab filter state for calls, xrefs, containment, evidence, timeline, diff, and plugin
Render active filter and path result summary
Add Inspector jump support for path rows

criteria: Existing Graph Lab all-relations behavior remains default
Path finding has max depth/node limits
Tests cover call-only and evidence-only graph views
